title: ciminalis ochroleuca
intro: Ciminalis ochroleuca, also known as yellow-green ciminalis, is a type of fungus that belongs to the genus Ciminalis and family Tricholomataceae. The medicinal properties of Ciminalis ochroleuca include its potential use in the treatment of various health conditions, such as digestive issues and fever, due to its antifungal and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this fungus include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Ciminalis ochroleuca are often used in traditional medicine, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
